resolved_footnotes: All scheduled study visits should be completed within the respective visit windows. If the participant is not able to come on-site for a study site visit as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic (self-quarantine or disruption of study site activities following business continuity plans and/or local government mandates for "stay at home" or "shelter in place"), a safety phone call to the participant should be made in place of the study site visit. The safety call should encompass all scheduled visit assessments that can be completed remotely, such as assessment for AEs and concomitant medications (eg, as defined in scheduled safety phone calls).
